legacy.analysis:
The run failed in `CatBoostClassifier.fit()` before completion, so no final submission or primary metric was produced. The immediate fix is to remove `rsm` when using CatBoost on GPU, or switch CatBoost to CPU; the completed models before the failure reported `logreg` balanced accuracy 0.919331 and `extratrees` balanced accuracy 0.928457.

Submission validation failed: stale working/submission.csv from before this node execution

args: catboost/private/libs/options/catboost_options.cpp:638: Error: rsm on GPU is supported for pairwise modes only
